title: Quebec City, QC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Quebec City, QC: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Quebec City is a city in QC with a population of 549,459. A charming historic walled city with European flair, the lowest cost of living among major Canadian cities, and world-famous winter carnival.

Last updated: June 30, 2026
